title: Saami Kittay Lyrics Daas
stanzas:
oru kodi pulli vachi
naan potten kadhal kolam
oru paadhi mudiyum munne
alichiruchu kaalam kaalam

innoru jenmam naan
marupadi porandhu vandhu
unakkaaga kathiruppen

Saami kitta solliputten
unna nenjil vachikitten
othayaa nee naanum
pesikkave mudiyalunu
manasukulla pesikittom

manasukulla pooti maracha
appa edhuku
valila siricha
kanavukulla odi pudichen
nesathula thaan
thayangi nadichen

nee irundha manasa alli
endha theeyil naanum poda
unnai enna kaetukitta
kadhal nenju thattuchu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Saami Kittay'?

'Saami Kittay' expresses deep feelings of love and connection between two individuals, highlighting their emotional bond.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Daas'?

In Daas, the song plays during a romantic sequence, showcasing the lead characters' affection for each other.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Saami Kittay'?

The song features the talented voices of Hariharan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Saami Kittay' released?

'Saami Kittay' was released on April 21, 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Saami Kittay' from the movie Daas, the heartfelt lyrics convey a deep sense of love and connection between the protagonists. The soothing melody, brought to life by the voices of Hariharan and Shreya Ghoshal, evokes emotions of romance and longing. This duet beautifully encapsulates the essence of love, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The song's enchanting composition by Yuvan adds to its charm, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Saami Kittay from the movie Daas is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the soulful voices of Hariharan and Shreya Ghoshal, paired with Yuvan's enchanting composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of this collaboration that resonates with emotions and romance.
stanzaMeanings: I have told God that I have kept you in my heart.
We both can't talk openly, but we are thinking about it.
We both can't take care properly, but we are dreaming about it.
I caught a fish with a thousand scales, love is a game that can be half done, time has passed.
In another life, I will be born again for you.
Even if they are together, if they are separated, I will pretend it’s a lie.
God, God.
I have told God that I have kept you in my heart. We both can't talk openly, but we are thinking about it.
We both can't take care properly, but we are dreaming about it.
In the depths of the ocean, the hunger burns and consumes everything.
In the heart, love burns at any moment.
When you left, I felt like I lost everything.
All your memories will remain with me as a battle.
Love is like a shield that protects the heart.
I have told God that I have kept you in my heart.
We both can't talk openly, but we are thinking about it.
We both can't take care properly, but we are dreaming about it.
In my heart, I have hidden everything, why should I laugh when I am dreaming? I have fallen in love with the feelings.
What is the use of being scared? What is the reason for this worry?
If you were here, I would not go into any fire, what should I ask you? My love has been hurt.
I have told God that I have kept you in my heart.
We both can't talk openly, but we are thinking about it.
We both can't take care properly, but we are dreaming about it.
I have told God that I have kept you in my heart. I have told God that I have kept you in my heart.
